command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Kuma user / auth setup ==="
docker exec uptime-kuma sh -c "sqlite3 /app/data/kuma.db 'SELECT id,username FROM user;'" 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Is 2FA enabled? ==="
docker exec uptime-kuma sh -c "sqlite3 /app/data/kuma.db 'SELECT id,username,twofa_status FROM user;'" 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Is the uptime-kuma-api python lib feasible? Check pip ==="
ssh_has_python=$(python3 --version 2>/dev/null)
echo "python on .201: $ssh_has_python"

echo "=== Settings: disableAuth? ==="
docker exec uptime-kuma sh -c "sqlite3 /app/data/kuma.db \"SELECT key,value FROM setting WHERE key IN ('disableAuth','primaryBaseURL');\"" 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
